headline: How The NEXT (LSE:NXT) Narrative Is Shifting With Trimmed Valuation And Brand Acquisitions
summary: NEXT’s updated analyst narrative now centres on a small trim to fair value, shifting from £148.04 to £147.86 per share. Supportive voices still see this refreshed target as leaving room for value creation, while more cautious analysts view the adjustment as a reminder that earlier expectations may have been demanding. As you read on, you will see how this recalibration fits into both the bullish and bearish cases, and how to keep track of an evolving story around the shares. Analyst Price...

headline: Amazon-Backed Nuclear Firm X-Energy Raises $1.02 Billion in IPO
summary: (Bloomberg) -- X-Energy Inc., a nuclear energy firm that counts Amazon.com Inc. as a backer, raised $1.02 billion in an upsized US initial public offering that priced above the marketed range.Most Read from BloombergAnthropic’s Mythos Model Is Being Accessed by Unauthorized UsersInside Alex Cooper’s Unwell: Tears, Screaming and Employees Looking for the ExitMeta Tells Staff It Will Cut 10% of Jobs in Push for EfficiencyMicrosoft Offers Buyouts to About 7% of US WorkersTrump Encourages Companies
